# External Dependencies
# Updated: 2026-05-18

## GOST
- Version: v3.2.6
- Repository: https://github.com/go-gost/gost
- Source directory: gost/gost-master/
- Release files:
  * gost_3.2.6_linux_386.tar.gz
  * gost_3.2.6_linux_amd64.tar.gz
  * gost_3.2.6_linux_arm64.tar.gz
  * gost_3.2.6_windows_386.zip
  * gost_3.2.6_windows_amd64.zip
  * gost_3.2.6_windows_arm64.zip

## gost-ui
- Version: master (commit: 7be5eee2216fd49c9675e2b0bd6a8e7e7a7b005c)
- Repository: https://github.com/go-gost/gost-ui
- Source directory: gost-ui/
